历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10650 → 12550 → 10429 → 11037 → 12008, showing significant fluctuations without a clear unilateral trend; in the recent 3 years (2023–2025), it oscillated between 10429 and 12008, with a baseline of about 12008 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 63 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 64 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 55 students, a decrease of 9 students (-14%) compared to 2025, indicating a clear reduction in enrollment, which eases competition and favors a forward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 24–26 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism incidents), school management responses, and admission cutoff signals, which may suppress some candidates' application psychology; however, the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 5th (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining overall high attention. Historical admission anomaly records show that Xiamen University's ranking among the 'Middle Nine' universities has declined in recent years; it has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, etc., indicating strong disciplinary strength; enrollment majors such as Economics, Accounting, Law, and Computer Science all correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors show differentiated popularity but are generally recommended; the total number of candidates in this province for 2026 is approximately 209,000 (estimated Physics Category about 136,895), a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025 (-1.9%), slightly reducing competition pressure; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, far from Chongqing, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing accounts for a small proportion (about 55 students in Physics Category), so regional preference has limited impact on ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12008, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 14% (ranking forward by about 1013 places), negative reputation signals (which may suppress some application enthusiasm), and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in this province, the reduction effect and negative public opinion roughly offset each other; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 10995, with a range of 10495–11495.
